race_name: L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France

top_categories.workout_context: 5,900ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Race-pace efforts that mimic L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before September.
75 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
79ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France. Train it until it feels boring.
L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 75 miles.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,900ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.
Base fitness for L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
At L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
76–85% FTP for extended efforts. At L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France, tempo is the floor you'll live on. Make it feel easy.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France’s 75 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at L'Étape Slovenia by Tour de France. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 75 miles of mixed terrain in Kranj, Slovenia.
